title: Gorilla Tag Music Pack
description: A simple music pack that replaces the music discs with Gorilla Tag songs. You can find the list of songs in {Gorilla Tag Music Pack/assets/minecraft/durations.txt}.
body:
### **When using my resource pack in content creation or servers, please credit my work and the one of the people who made the songs!**

Older versions of the resource pack will be deleted when a new one is out unless it has a big change and doesn't need a fix.

- ?.?.**X**: Minor fix or tiny change
- ?.**X**.?: Minor-moderate change
- **X**.?.?: Major change/release

Requirements:
[Jukebox Custom Disc Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/jukebox-custom-disc-fix)

Supported languages:
English (US), French (Canada)

How to contact me:
- Discord: @im.phil.

_[CREDITS]_
Pack by: Me | Textures by: Me | Music by: Cody O'Quinn, David Anderson Kirk, Frank Dean (AKA Harry Dacre), Jaguar Jen, Jason Hayes, jmancurly, Lewis Capaldi, Stunshine, The Repressions
